prompt: Create an ultra-detailed cinematic vertical portrait of a cute little girl with long dark brown hair and a golden retriever puppy peeking out together from a narrow horizontal opening between large rough sandstone rocks. The girl is on the left and the puppy is on the right, both crouched low and framed tightly inside the rocky gap at the same eye level. The composition is intimate and centered, with the massive tan rock slab forming a low ceiling above them and another sandstone ledge forming the foreground below. Show exactly two visible subjects: one child with long hair, one puppy with floppy ears and one paw resting forward; also show the child’s small hand gripping the lower rock ledge on the left. Add two opaque square privacy blocks covering both faces: one dark brown square over the girl’s face and one warm tan-brown square over the puppy’s face. Use warm golden-hour sunlight, natural earthy beige and ochre tones, highly realistic sandstone texture, shallow depth of field, soft shadows inside the crevice, documentary wildlife-photography realism, 4:3 vertical framing, no text, no watermark.
